infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: My Gallery uses the camera so you can capture images for your personal gallery.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: My Gallery uses your photo library so you can choose images for your gallery.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: My Gallery uses the microphone so you can dictate image captions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: My Gallery uses speech recognition to turn your voice into captions.

plugins.cameraPermission: My Gallery uses the camera so you can capture images.
plugins.photosPermission: My Gallery uses your photo library so you can choose images.

plugins.microphonePermission: My Gallery uses the microphone so you can dictate captions.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: My Gallery uses speech recognition to create captions from your voice.
